name: Wattsychic Fighting Porter
name_jp: エレキック・ファイティング・ポーター
desc: Special Summon up to 2 Level 3 or lower LIGHT monsters from your hand. If you Summoned 2 monsters with the same original Type, those monsters can attack directly this turn. If they have the same original Level, they also cannot be destroyed by battle this turn. You can only activate 1 "Wattsychic Fighting Porter" per turn.
eff: Special Summon up to 2 Level 3 or lower LIGHT monsters from your hand. If you Summoned 2 monsters with the same original Type, those monsters can attack directly this turn. If they have the same original Level, they also cannot be destroyed by battle this turn. You can only activate 1 "Wattsychic Fighting Porter" per turn.

attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
